---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you would like to see added.

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

Example:
It is currently difficult to quickly see multiple upcoming buses.

## Proposed solution

Describe how you think the feature should work.

Example:
Display the next two upcoming buses instead of only the next one.

## Possible implementation

(Optional)

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, please describe them.

## Additional context

Add any additional context, screenshots, or examples that could help explain the idea.
